title: Dharam Katha
subTitle: A religious leader sheds light on the teachings of the Almighty and encourages followers to take the path of spirituality.

title: Mai Ke Jagran
subTitle: Devotees gather to participate in devotional singing, reading of religious texts and performances throughout the night in praise of the mother goddess.

title: Sringar Aarti
subTitle: Priests and devotees from across the region perform elaborate rituals, offering heartfelt prayers and seeking blessings from the Almighty.

title: Bhakti Bhav
subTitle: A religious leader encourages followers to take the path of spirituality.

title: Bhakti Aradhana
subTitle: Various religious singers and musicians sing devotional songs in praise of the Almighty in order to help devotees get closer to God.

title: Om Namah Shiway
subTitle: Lord Shiva, a Hindu God, strives to overcome multiple challenges, demonstrating his strength and wisdom as he fulfils his cosmic duties.

title: Shree Ganesh
subTitle: Lord Ganesha, the son of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, fights evil forces to save the world and protect innocent disciples.

title: Mai Ke Darbar
subTitle: Devotees from across the region sing devotional songs and hymns, offering heartfelt prayers and seeking blessings from the Almighty.

title: Mai Ke Darbar
subTitle: Devotees from across the region sing devotional songs and hymns, offering heartfelt prayers and seeking blessings from the Almighty.

title: Jai Jai Shiv Shankar
subTitle: Namita, a kind-hearted farmer's daughter from a small village in Bihar, lives with her mother and stepsister. Their unwavering faith in Lord Shankar guides and protects them through life's challenges.

title: Badki Malkain
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Hamar Sautan Hamar Saheli
subTitle: Chanda, a tribal girl, is forced to marry Thakur Nirbhay Singh despite loving Madhav. When Madhav returns, Chanda must choose between societal expectations and true love.

title: Snehoor
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
